description: The entity communicates with external parties regarding matters affecting the functioning of internal control.

subcriteria.name: external_notification
subcriteria.reference_text: Incident escalation procedures include notification of external parties such as customers, regulators, and partners. Breach notification procedures define timelines and communication templates. Status page or customer portal provides system status updates.

subcriteria.name: customer_communication
subcriteria.reference_text: Security commitments communicated to customers through service agreements, website, or customer portal. Contact information for reporting security concerns published on website. Support channels available for customers and external users.

subcriteria.name: vendor_agreements
subcriteria.reference_text: Agreements with vendors and business partners include security terms, compliance requirements, and service levels. Business associate agreements, NDAs, and data processing agreements executed with third parties.

subcriteria.name: system_description
subcriteria.reference_text: Description of system boundaries, infrastructure, and services published for external users. Trust center or security page describes security practices, certifications, and data handling procedures.

mismatch_signals.reason: Internal-only communication does not satisfy external communication requirements.
Access management is not external communication evidence.
